wikitext.*:
'''Colors''' are dyes that can be used to customize the body of a [[birb]]. Users can purchase colors using rainbow stones in [[The Color Studio]]. There are currently 235 dyes available, divided between: Headpatch (38), Cheeks (32), Beak (24), Body (36), Wings (39), Belly (32), Feet (34). ==Parts of the Body== :''See also: [[Stages of Growth]]'' ===Headpatch === [[File:HeadpatchDyeBottle.jpeg|thumb|A bottle of headpatch color dye as seen in The Color Studio. The dye color is Deep Red. Color dyes for the headpatch cost 500 rainbow stones.|left]] The headpatch is the top of the birb’s head. When the birb is a baby, it is the same color as the birb’s body. When the birb is a toddler, the headpatch is gray. When the birb becomes a child, the user can choose a random color for the birb’s headpatch and wings. At this point, they can also purchase headpatch color dyes and wings color dyes in The Color Studio.{{Clear}} ===Cheeks=== [[File:CheeksDyeBottle.jpeg|thumb|A bottle of cheeks color dye as seen in The Color Studio. The dye color is Dark Brown. Color dyes for the cheeks cost 300 rainbow stones.|left]] The cheeks are patches on the birb’s face. When the birb is a baby, child, and toddler, they are the same color as the birb’s face. When the birb becomes a teenager, the user can choose a random color for the birb’s cheeks and feet. At this point, they can also purchase cheeks color dyes and feet color dyes in The Color Studio.{{Clear}} ===Beak=== [[File:BeakyDyeBottle.jpeg|thumb|A bottle of beak color dye as seen in The Color Studio. The dye color is Dark Blue. Color dyes for the beak cost 300 rainbow stones.|left]] The beak is the birb’s mouth. When the birb is a baby, the beak is yellow. When the birb becomes a toddler, the user can choose one of three random colors for the birb’s beak. At this point, they can also purchase beak color dyes and body color dyes in The Color Studio.{{Clear}} ===Body=== [[File:BodyDyeBottle.jpeg|thumb|A bottle of body color dye as seen in The Color Studio. The dye color is Lavender. Color dyes for the body cost 900 rainbow stones.|left]]The body is the part of the birb that is not the head patch, cheeks, wings, or tummy. When a new user is choosing an egg, they can choose between Blue, Orange, Pink, Green, Purple, or Gray. This determines the color of the birb as a baby. When the birb becomes a toddler, the user can purchase body color dyes in The Color Studio. {{Clear}} ===Wings=== [[File:WingsDyeBottle.jpeg|thumb|A bottle of wings color dye as seen in The Color Studio. The dye color is Lilac. Color dyes for the wings cost 500 rainbow stones.|left]]The wings are the hands of the birb. When the birb is a baby. they are the same color as the birb’s body. When the birb is a toddler, the wings are gray. When the birb becomes a child, the user can choose a random color for the birb’s wings and headpatch. At this point, they can also purchase wing color dyes and headpatch color dyes in The Color Studio. {{Clear}} ===Tummy=== [[File:TummyDyeBottle.jpeg|thumb|A bottle of tummy color dye as seen in The Color Studio. The dye color is Tan. Color dyes for the tummy cost 500 rainbow stones.|left]]The tummy is a patch on the birb’s stomach. When the birb is a baby, toddler, child, and teenager, it is the same color as the birb’s body. When the birb becomes an adult, the user can choose a random color for the birb’s tummy. At this point, they can also purchase tummy color dyes in The Color Studio. {{{Clear}} === Feet=== [[File:FeetDyeBottle.jpeg|thumb|A bottle of feet color dye as seen in The Color Studio. The dye color is Light Orange. Color dyes for the feet cost 300 rainbow stones.|left]]The feet are what the birb uses to journey. When the birb is a baby, toddler, and child, they are gray. When the birb becomes a teenager, the user can choose a random color for the birb’s feet and cheeks. At this point, they can also purchase feet color dyes and cheeks color dyes in The Color Studio. {{Clear}} ==Colors == === Headpatch === File:Headpatch1.jpg|Gray, Blue, Red,
